prompt.en: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Liang Xingche, a 29-year-old East Asian male planetarium dome projection operator for the North City Planetarium. He has a very bulky muscular adult male power build: extremely broad shoulders, heavy chest, thick neck and traps, huge upper arms, thick forearms, strong thighs, substantial rounded mass. Warm wheat skin, wide rectangular face with a strong jaw, one tiny beauty mark on the left cheekbone, deep amber-brown rounded narrow eyes, thick straight brows slightly raised; fluffy short dark chestnut-black hair with a few star-gold highlights at the tips, short stubble. Bright docent expression: thick lips slightly open as if explaining constellation positions, brows and eyes lifted with clear friendly energy. Outfit: a clean white fitted short-sleeve shirt tucked into high-waist trousers, visibly stretched across chest, shoulders, and arms; a long deep-indigo planetarium uniform vest worn open at the front down to the waist, knee-length with high side slits, not covering the white shirt; high-waist charcoal wide-leg docent uniform trousers with crisp trouser lines; thick-soled black quiet indoor shoes. Accessories: white half-palm focusing gloves, narrow waist cinch connected to a side film canister and astrolabe hook, small silver dome-key pendant necklace. Visible weapon object: a folding astrolabe lantern umbrella held in one hand, the canopy readable as a physical star-map disk and projection-lens mechanism that can unfold into a protective screen; a side film canister links to the umbrella with a few restrained low-glow star-gold orbital lines. Fantasy anchor: only a few subtle low-glow star-gold pinholes, short orbital tracks, and warm-silver lens edges, no strong diffuse glow. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified small metal buckles and lens rims; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no grimy industrial texture. Style: clean Kyoto Animation-like TV anime game character concept art, crisp readable outline, tidy cel shading, fresh colors, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or any similar green on the character.
prompt.cn: 只画一个人物：梁星澈，29岁东亚男性，北城星象馆的天文馆穹幕放映员。非常厚实的巨型力量体格，极宽肩、厚胸、粗脖子和斜方肌、巨大上臂与粗前臂、强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽长方脸，下颌厚实，左颧一颗小浅痣，深邃圆狭的深琥珀棕眼，浓平眉略抬；蓬松深栗黑短发，发尾少量星金挑染，短胡茬。表情是开朗讲解式微笑：厚唇微张像正在讲解星座位置，眉眼明亮上扬。服装：白色贴身短袖上衣扎进高腰裤，胸肩和手臂被明显撑紧；外层是深靛长马甲式穹幕制服，前襟敞开到腰侧，长度过膝但两侧高开衩，不遮住白色上衣主体；高腰炭黑宽腿讲解制服裤，裤线利落，厚底黑色静音馆内鞋。配件：半掌白色调焦手套，窄腰封连接腰侧胶片匣和星盘挂扣，细链小型穹幕钥片。手持折叠星盘灯伞，伞面像星盘与投影镜片组合，能展开成可见的护幕实体道具；腰侧胶片匣与灯伞之间有少量低亮星金星轨线。幻想锚点：只有少量低亮星金星孔、短星轨和暖银镜片边，不要强烈大面积发光。材质是干净动画色块、简化褶皱、少量图形化金属扣和镜片边，不要写实布料纹理、油亮皮革、湿身材质或脏污工业质感。干净京都动画式 TV 动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简洁赛璐璐上色，单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见，居中，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，完全均匀，无渐变、无阴影、无地面、无反射、无场景。绝对禁止 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字、标签、页面截图、多人、无关物件、水印。不要在角色身上使用 #00ff00 或接近绿幕的颜色。

forbidden: profile attributes appended directly to image prompt
generation notes appended directly to image prompt

chromaKey.name: green
chromaKey.reason: The final image prompt explicitly specifies this chroma-key color, so it overrides automatic color inference.
